title: Tnze's IME MOD
description: A Mod focused on improve IME experience on Windows
body:
A Mod focused on improve IME experience on Windows。
The goal of this mod is to become the most perfect input method mod you can find on Windows.

After install this MOD:
- IME will only shows up when there is text editor get focused. No need to switching IMEs by hand any more.
- Candidate view can display on TRUE Fullscreen mode.
- System IME is used, your IME hobbits get kept.
- Technically most consistent with Microsoft's imagination of applications supporting text input on Windows

The technology used in this mod is extremely advanced, and it requires at least Java 23 or higher to run.
